Notes: Single UPDATE adds a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name, testing how the server resolves RFC 2181 CNAME exclusivity within one update message.

Steps.Description: Add a CNAME and an A RR at cname1.campus.edu. in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: cname1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME RRset exists after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: cname1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE.
